title: HUAJI Age: Astral Regenesis
description: A meme mod packed with China's iconic internet jokes and absurdist viral legends.
body:
# 滑稽纪元：轮回星启 | HUAJI Age: Astral Regenesis 一个以中文互联网上的“梗”、“meme”、“鬼畜明星”等要素组成的模组。 A meme mod packed with China's iconic internet jokes and absurdist viral legends. >在这个宇宙中，存在着一种名为滑稽的奇特之物，它们无处不在，并构成了千千万万的事物，据说，持有滑稽的星辉之力，便可得到传说中鬼畜先辈的无上之力。 > >In this universe exists a peculiar entity known as "HUAJI". It is omnipresent, constituting all things. Legend says that whoever wields the power of the Astral HUAJI shall obtain the supreme power of the legendary "Kichiku Senpai". ## 概述 | Overview 本模组移植了 _滑稽纪元II:无尽星河_ 的大部分内容，并有额外的追加内容。 This mod is largely a port of _Huaji Age II: Infinite Galaxy_, with additional new content. 本模组将会长期维护，并会移植到更高的Minecraft版本。 This mod will receive long-term maintenance and will be ported to newer versions of Minecraft. ## 联动 | Compat ✔️：已完成 🚧：制作中 ✔️：Complete 🚧：In Progress | 模组名
Mod name | 联动状态
Statusv | 联动内容
Details | | ------ |:--------:| -------- | | JEI | ✔️ | 配方显示支持
Recipe View Support | | Patchouli | 🚧 | 游戏内帮助手册
In-game Guidebook
**注意：此手册直接移植自前代，部分内容存在过时的可能性**

Allows certain items to be placed in Curios slots and take effect. | | 辣条工艺 2

Additional weapons and new seasonings for the Flavoring Table. | | 拔刀剑：重锋
SlashBlade: Resharped | ✔️ | 三把全新的拔刀剑
Three brand new SlashBlades. | | 农夫乐事
Farmers Delight | ✔️ | 额外的合成配方
Additional crafting recipes. | | 无尽贪婪：重生
Re:Avaritia | ✔️ | 额外的奇点和合成配方
Additional Singularities and crafting recipes. | ## 协议 | License 此模组遵循 MIT 协议开源。 This mod is open-sourced under the **MIT License**. 你可以在遵循本协议的前提下将此模组加入你的整合包/服务器中。 You may include it in your modpacks/servers as long as you **comply with the license terms**.
